Added Mongolian (mn) language support
prs.body: This PR adds full **Mongolian (mn)** language support to DrawDB, delivering a complete and accurate translation for users in Mongolia. All strings have been translated following DrawDB’s established i18n structure and match the completeness of other supported languages. ### What’s Included #### 1.New Language Support - Added **mn.js** - Added language entry to **i18n.js** #### **2. Translation Quality & Structure** * All interpolation placeholders preserved * e.g., `{{tableName}}`, `{{columnName}}`, `{{typeName}}`, `{{num}}`, etc. * Structure exactly mirrors the English source file * Terminology kept consistent across: * Core menus & actions * Tables, relationships, enums, notes, subject areas * Validation messages, dialogs, and warnings * DBML view, multiselect, and bulk operations * Sharing, export, import, timeline, tasks, and version history * Ensures the language appears in the UI and loads correctly #### Testing - Verified that all keys and placeholders are correctly translated - Confirmed UI screens, menus, dialogs, and errors render properly in Mongolian - Build runs without issues #### Screenshots:

prs.title: Added Troubleshooting Section for LightningCSS/PostCSS Installation Issues
prs.body:
### Summary
This PR adds a dedicated troubleshooting section to the README to help developers quickly diagnose and resolve common LightningCSS and PostCSS issues.

### Changes
- Added a new **"Troubleshooting — PostCSS / lightningcss native binary"** section to the README.
- Documented the typical error message developers may encounter.
- Provided clear, step-by-step remediation steps:
  - `npm rebuild lightningcss --update-binary`
  - Reinstall dependencies (remove `node_modules` + lockfile)
  - Rosetta / build-from-source options for macOS ARM
- Added context explaining why LightningCSS native binaries may fail silently, especially in Tailwind v4 setups.

### Benefits
- Helps developers resolve silent or confusing build failures more efficiently.
- Reduces repeated troubleshooting questions and setup friction.
- Improves onboarding reliability across macOS, Linux, and CI environments.

### Notes
- Documentation-only change; no application code was modified.

prs.title: Fix: Prevent Flicker When Navigation Happens During Render
prs.body:
This PR prevents a brief flicker that occurred when navigation happened during render, causing nested <Outlet /> to temporarily render null. Navigation is now triggered before paint (React) or on mount (Solid), so the UI transitions smoothly without flashing.

### Bug Fix
- Eliminates the temporary blank/empty state shown when navigating during render.
- Ensures nested <Outlet /> content renders immediately with no flicker.

* **Refactor**
  * Optimized navigation timing to ensure proper execution phase synchronization across React and Solid framework examples.
  * Updated navigation effect handling to use layout-phase execution for improved consistency.
